query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A vertical photograph showing a circular vortex of yellow flowers, likely dandelions or buttercups, arranged in concentric spiral patterns radiating from a dark center. The flowers appear swept into a radial motion forming a tunnel-like or whirlpool composition. A purple border frames the outer edges, transitioning into blue and green tones before giving way to the dominant yellow floral mass. Fine white scratch-like lines overlay portions of the image. A watermark reading 'edmontonphotocontest.com' appears at the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A vertical photograph dominated by intentional radial blur creating a dizzying vortex effect, with yellow flowers swept into concentric spiral patterns that radiate from a dark central void. The blur softens all floral detail into streaking motion, producing an abstract composition where individual flowers dissolve into flowing color bands. A purple border at the outer edges transitions through blue and green into the yellow mass, while fine white scratch-like surface artifacts overlay portions of the image. The unconventional framing emphasizes the tunnel-like motion drawing the eye toward the black center. A watermark reading 'edmontonphotocontest.com' sits at the bottom edge.
